titleStmt.title: SII 41.142: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 142. (A.R. No. 141 of 1905.) Karuvūr, Tiruchirāppaḷḷi Taluk, Tiruchirāppaḷḷi District. On the Moṭṭai-gōpuram of the Pasupatīśvara temple at Karuvūr, left of entrance.

summary.p: Records a king's order communicated to the temple trustees of Karayūr Tirupāṇḍikkoḍumuḍi in Koṅgu alias Chōḻakēraḷa-maṇḍalam saying that he made the village of Iḷanagar in Taṭṭaiyūr-nāḍu in the same maṇḍalam as dēvadāna-iṟaiyili to the temple as requested by his officer Chōḻakōṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirupuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ Īḻamum maturaiyum pāṇṭiyaṉ muṭittalaiyuṅ koṇṭaruḷi vīrāapiṣekamum vijayā Apiṣekamum paṇṇi Aruḷiṉa śrītirupuvaṉaviratevaṟku yāṇṭu muppattu Āṟāvatu tirupuvaṉaccakkaravatti koneriṉmai
koṇṭāṉ koṅkāṉa coḻakeraḷa maṇṭalattuk karaiyūrt tiruppāṇṭikkoṭumuṭi Āḻuṭaiyār koyiṟ tevakaṉmikkum śimāheśvara kaṇkāṇi ceyvārkaḷukkum cikāryaṅ ceyvāṉukkum Ittevaṟku veṇṭu nivantaṅkaḷukkumā
ka Immaṇṭalattuttaṭṭaiyūr ṉāṭṭu Iḷanakaril tevatāna Iṟaiyili Iṭa nām nirvārtta nilam Aimpatiṟṟu veliyum Iṭumiṭattu Ānporuntattuttalai peṟṟu Ivvūṟku nirpāyntu varukiṟa vākkālukku vaṭakkumpiṇam pokiṟa vatikku meṟkum vaṭatalattukku nirpāy
kkālukkutteṟkum cāttaṉūṟku kiḻakkum naṭuvu Uṭpaṭṭa nilattuk kaḷarum meṭum pala tevarkaḷukkum tevatānamumāna nilam nikki nikkiniṉṟa nilattile Aimapatiṟṟu veli nilamum muppattāṟāvatu mutal Antarāyam pāṭṭam Uṭpaṭa tevatāna Iṟaiyiliyāka Iṭak
kaṭapeṟaveṇumenṟu coḻakon namakkuc connamaiyil Ippaṭi ceyyakkaṭavatāka colli kaṇakkilum Iṭṭuk koḷḷakkaṭavarkaḷāka varikkūṟu ceyvārkaḷukkuñ coṉnom Inṉilam muppattāṟāvatu mutal Antarāyam pāṭṭam Uṭpaṭa Ittevaṟku tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāka kai
k koṇṭu Inṉivantañcellap paṇṇuka .. Eḻutiṉāṉ tirumantiraōlaiirācanārayaṇa muventa veḷāṉ .. Ivai villavarāyaṉ Eḻuttu .. Ivai cittarāyaṉ Eḻuttu .. Ivai viḻiñattaraiyaṉ Eḻuttu .. Ivai Iḷakarāyan Eḻuttu .. Ivai cetikularāyaṉ Eḻuttu .. Ivai toṇṭaimā
n Eḻuttu .. Itu māṟṟuvāṉ keṅkaikkaraiyil kurāṟ pacuk koṉṟapāvaṅ koḷvāṉ .. Itu paṉmāheśvararakṣai .§ Ikkalveṭṭinen kaṟaiyūr taṭṭāṉ nāyantiṇṭaṉāna tiruñāṉacampanta Ācāriyaneṉ .
Digital edition of SII 41.142 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
